name: erpnext-toolkit
description: All-in-one ERPNext/Frappe toolkit: skills for API integration, custom app & DocType development, low-code customization, reports and business workflows; slash commands for common ERP tasks; specialized agents; and a live MCP connection to your ERPNext instance.

erpnext_url.title: ERPNext URL
erpnext_url.description: Base URL of your ERPNext instance, e.g. https://erp.example.com

erpnext_api_key.title: ERPNext API key
erpnext_api_key.description: API key from your ERPNext user (Settings > My Settings > API Access)

erpnext_api_secret.title: ERPNext API secret
erpnext_api_secret.description: API secret generated alongside the API key
